emptyState.tryOtherFilters: No skills match the current filters — try adjusting or clearing them

toggle.enabledTip: Enabled — click to remove from agent system prompt
toggle.disabledTip: Disabled — click to add to agent system prompt

installDialog.title: Install Skill
installDialog.sourcePlaceholder:
Enter a source, e.g.:
clawhub:github
github:owner/repo
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/...
/local/path/to/skill
installDialog.sourceHint: Supports clawhub, GitHub, URL, local path, and future safeskill: sources

create.guidePanelDesc: Choose a guide or case. Rex will load the skill-builder skill first, confirm goal, triggers, file structure, and validation before generating files.

guideActions.label: How to Create
guideActions.description: Start from purpose, triggers, instruction structure, dependencies, and validation.
guideActions.prompt: Please follow the .flocks/plugins/skills/skill-builder skill to guide me through creating a Flocks Skill. Do not write files yet. Use the question tool to ask one most important question at a time and help me clarify skill name, purpose, trigger scenarios, needed references/scripts, dependencies, output directory, and validation. After I confirm, generate ~/.flocks/plugins/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md and any necessary files.

guideActions.label: Clarify Instructions
guideActions.description: Turn a fuzzy capability into a SKILL.md agents can use correctly.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me structure the skill instructions for SKILL.md. Ask one question at a time to confirm: what problem the skill solves, trigger keywords, when to use or avoid it, execution steps, reference materials, reusable scripts, quality checks, and examples.

guideActions.label: Dependencies & Checks
guideActions.description: Plan bin/env/install specs, smoke tests, and failure guidance.
guideActions.prompt: Please use the skill-builder skill to help me design dependencies and validation for this Skill. First confirm whether it needs CLI tools, Python/Node packages, environment variables, or external services, then propose install specs, check commands, smoke tests, and user-facing failure guidance.

caseActions.label: Security Analysis Skill
caseActions.description: Capture threat analysis steps, report format, and constraints as a Skill.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a security analysis Skill that guides agents through alert or IOC analysis and outputs a structured assessment report. Please follow the skill-builder skill to guide me through triggers, analysis flow, report fields, references, and validation.

caseActions.label: Code Migration Skill
caseActions.description: Capture cross-file migration, tests, and rollback considerations.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a code migration Skill for framework upgrades or cross-file migrations. Please follow the skill-builder skill to guide me through applicable scenarios, migration steps, risk checks, test commands, and output format.

caseActions.label: External System Skill
caseActions.description: Record usage flow, prohibited actions, and tool-call constraints for a system.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create an external system usage Skill that guides agents when operating a business system. Please follow the skill-builder skill to guide me through system name, login/query flow, available tools, prohibited bypasses, sensitive data handling, and acceptance checks.

sheet.readonlyNote: Built-in Skill is read-only, cannot be modified
sheet.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete Skill "{{name}}"?
